title: tithymalus subpubens
intro: Tithymalus subpubens, also known as Euphorbia subpubens, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its sap, which contains a milky latex that has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tithymalus subpubens include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and poultices, to support skin health and treat various ailments.
